games.explanation: The market has MIN as a +158 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Simeon Woods Richardson keeps MIN competitive on the mound against Nolan McLean. Cold temps suppress the bats.

BAL is getting plus-money at +116 and the model thinks that's too cheap. Shane Baz keeps BAL competitive on the mound against Kris Bubic. The sim projects BAL to plate 5.0 runs — expect some fireworks.
CHC is the better team by Elo and the sim confirms it — the market isn't giving them enough credit. Shota Imanaga toes the rubber against Jesus Luzardo. CHC holds a commanding 158-point Elo edge.
The market has Athletics as a +150 underdog, but our simulation disagrees. Jacob Lopez keeps Athletics competitive on the mound against Luis Castillo. Pitcher's park suppresses the long ball.
ARI is the better team by Elo and the sim confirms it — the market isn't giving them enough credit. Merrill Kelly toes the rubber against Sean Burke. Pitcher's park suppresses the long ball.
